scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "wait-on http://localhost:3001/api/health -t 30000 && npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev && cd frontend && npm install --include=dev && cd ../backend && npm install --include=dev
scripts.build: npm run install:all && cd backend && npx tsc && cd ../frontend && npx tsc -b && npx vite build --outDir ../backend/public
